allow: PowerShell(ssh root@192.168.1.1 "jq '.activities[] | select\(.id == 19113872617\) | {id, average_temp}' /www/strava/me/activities.json; echo '---detail---'; jq '{average_temp, start_latlng}' /www/strava/me/details/19113872617.json; echo '---weather-cache---'; jq '.\\"19113872617\\"' /usr/lib/strava-my-activities/weather-cache.json 2>/dev/null || echo '\(no cache entry\)'")
PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c 'ls /opt/ && ls /www/strava/me/details/ | grep "2026-06-28" | head -5')
PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c 'grep "2026-06-28-06-55-cycling" /usr/lib/healthsync/activities.ndjson | jq "{id, average_temp, temp_source}"')

PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c 'curl -fsS --max-time 15 "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=51.617477&longitude=16.868052&start_date=2026-06-28&end_date=2026-06-28&daily=temperature_2m_mean&timezone=auto" 2>&1 || echo "CURL FAILED"')
PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c 'jq -r "select\(.average_temp == null\) | .id" /usr/lib/healthsync/activities.ndjson | wc -l')
PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c '. /opt/strava-lib.sh 2>/dev/null; _t=$\(fetch_weather_temp "51.617477" "16.868052" "2026-06-28" || true\); echo "result: $_t; source: $_fw_temp_source"')
PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c 'grep "2026-06-28-06-55-cycling" /usr/lib/healthsync/activities.ndjson | jq "{id, average_temp, gpx_file, date}"')
PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c 'jq -r "select\(.average_temp == null\) | [.id, \(.gpx_file // \\"\\"\)] | @tsv" /usr/lib/healthsync/activities.ndjson | head -5')
PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c 'ls /www/strava/me/gpx/2026.06.28_06.55-CYCLING.gpx 2>&1 && grep "<trkpt" /www/strava/me/gpx/2026.06.28_06.55-CYCLING.gpx | head -1')

PowerShell(podman exec jovial_wozniak sh -c 'cat /usr/lib/healthsync/gdrive-token.json 2>/dev/null | jq "{refresh_token_prefix: \(.refresh_token // "" | .[0:20]\), expires_at}" 2>/dev/null || echo "no token file"')

hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -like '*.sh') { $sh = 'C:\Program Files\Git\bin\sh.exe'; $err = (& $sh -n $f 2>&1 | Out-String).Trim(); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $ctx = 'SHELL SYNTAX ERROR in ' + $f + ': ' + $err; @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PostToolUse';additionalContext=$ctx}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } else { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PostToolUse';additionalContext='Syntax OK. Remember to run the functional tests: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\test\run-tests.ps1'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } }
